description_long: This kiosk is a small, square brick building with a prominent domed roof, reminiscent of traditional South Asian or Mughal architecture. The structure features four robust cylindrical corner columns and a weathered brick facade, with the front side displaying three arched entryways, the central one being the largest and most ornate. The brickwork is aged, with visible discoloration and patina, suggesting historical significance or long-term exposure to the elements. The roof is a large, hemispherical dome made of the same material as the walls, with no visible windows but a small, box-like structure on one corner, possibly for ventilation or maintenance access. The base of the kiosk is surrounded by a slightly raised platform, blending into the surrounding ground. The overall appearance is solid, monumental, and designed for durability rather than portability.
description: A small, square brick kiosk with a large domed roof, four corner columns, and three arched entryways on the front facade. The structure is weathered and historic, with no visible windows and a raised platform base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three arched entryways, the central one being the largest, flanked by two cylindrical columns on each side.
description_view_1: Side view with a single arched doorway in the center and two corner columns, highlighting the solid brickwork and dome.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible doors or windows, only the brick wall and corner columns are present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single arched doorway and two corner columns, similar to view 1 but with a small box-like structure visible on the roof.
attribute_door_configuration: Three arched open entryways on the front, one arched open entryway on each side, none on the rear
attribute_roof_design: Large hemispherical domed roof made of brick, no overhangs or skylights, with a small box-like structure on one corner
attribute_architectural_style: Traditional South Asian or Mughal architectural style with domed roof and arched entryways
